2011–2020 Global Expansion 2011–2020 Entered 14+ countries, formed partnerships, optimised logistics, strengthened supply chains, integrated sustainability and sourcing.
2021–Present Diversification & Innovation 2021–Present Invested in copper mining assets, launched ESG framework, adopted tools, expanded reach, diversified portfolio.
Today Today — A Trusted Global Leader Resilient enterprise connecting industries worldwide with reliable sourced commodities, delivering sustainable value and partnerships.
Built strong supplier customer networks, expanded metals agriculture, established regional hubs, strengthened finance expertise.
